title: Implement Dirty-Flag Render Loop
description: Set needsRender = true only on state changes, skip render otherwise. Cut idle CPU by ~95%.
notes: This is ALREADY IMPLEMENTED. GameState has needsRender flag, markDirty() method, and startRenderLoop() checks needsRender before calling render(). Also checks simulation.animating, sparkParticles, and wireManager.drawing.
acceptance: Render loop skips when !needsRender and no animation/particles/drawing
